data.title: Convicted January 6 Rioter: 'Trump's Gonna Pardon Me Anyways!'
data.description: Philip Grillo brazenly taunted a judge following his sentencing for his role in the January 6, 2021, Capitol riot, expressing his confidence that President-elect Trump will pardon him.

data.title: StraitsX Co-Founder Liu: We Envision a Future Where Stablecoins Play a Pivotal Role In the Digital Economy
data.description: Benzinga recently spoke with StraitsX co-founder Tianwei Liu to delve into the origins of StraitsX, the transformative role of stablecoins in cross-border payments, his outlook on the future of stablecoins and digital payments, and much more.

data.title: Why Cannabis Sales Are Down In Massachusetts And New Mexico: The Numbers Behind The Dip
data.description: Massachusetts' average revenue per dispensary dropped to $362k/month, down 8% year-over-year, in New Mexico sales went down 3% in November.

data.title: Mark Cuban Shares The One Thing He Splurged On After Striking It Rich: 'I'M Not A Big Spender'
data.description: Billionaire entrepreneur Mark Cuban has opened up about his path to success and his unique spending habits in a recent interview.

data.title: Rigetti Computing Skyrockets To Record High As Investor Confidence Soars
data.description: The stock of Rigetti Computing has hit a new 52-week high, reaching $3.67.
